channel.title: DMR on Kinda Log
channel.description: Recent content in DMR on Kinda Log

item.title: [DMR/논문] Probe Lasso: A novel method to rope in differentially methylated regions with 450K DNA methylation data
item.description: [DMR/논문] Probe Lasso: A novel method to rope in differentially methylated regions with 450K DNA methylation data # Abstract # The speed and resolution at which we can scour the genome for DNA methylation changes has improved immeasurably in the last 10 years and the advent of the Illumina 450K BeadChip has made epigenome-wide association studies (EWAS) a reality. The resulting datasets are conveniently formatted to allow easy alignment of significant hits to genes and genetic features, however; methods that parse significant hits into discreet differentially methylated regions (DMRs) remain a challenge to implement.
